title: Why Wordie

fields.label: Section Kicker
fields.name: section_kicker
fields.instructions: Small uppercase label above the heading. Example: "Why Wordie"

fields.label: Section Heading
fields.name: section_heading
fields.instructions: H2 heading in the left panel.
fields.default_value: How we work is the difference
fields.placeholder: How we work is the difference

fields.label: Section Description
fields.name: section_description
fields.instructions: Supporting paragraph beneath the heading. 2–3 sentences.
fields.default_value: Enterprise quality. Without the enterprise overhead. Our AI-enhanced workflows and lean specialist model let us deliver what large agencies charge multiples more for.
fields.placeholder: Enterprise quality. Without the enterprise overhead…

fields.label: Reasons
fields.name: reasons
fields.instructions: Add 2–6 numbered reasons. Numbers (01, 02…) are generated automatically — just enter the title and description.

sub_fields.label: Title
sub_fields.name: reason_title
sub_fields.instructions: Short heading for this reason. Example: "Design first, always"

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.name: reason_description
sub_fields.placeholder: Every project begins with UX research and a clear design rationale…

description: Fields for the Why Wordie numbered reasons block.
